title: Axolotl villagers
description: This texture pack changes villagers into axolotls!
body:
![Axolotl Villagers](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/3gMf3IUI/images/8366aa202e74ab6946096503d54330be0262256c.png)



### This texture pack changes villagers, wandering traders and zombie villagers into axolotls! 

> Featured in many "Lobotomy Minecraft" TikToks...

optifine/Entity Model Features required


<details>
<summary>Recommended texture packs</summary>

Recommended texture packs to use with _Axolotl Villagers_

[Axolotl illagers by Raphaxolotlz (me)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/axolotl-illagers)

[Axolotl Villagers SFX by enenoir](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/axolotl-villagers-sfx)

</details>
